notes: I'm fairly new to Linux and recently switched from Windows. With all the right drivers installed everything works!

gpu: AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT (radeonsi, navi10, LLVM 17.0.6, DRM 3.54, 6.6.7-gentoo)
notes: Works as expected for a desktop/non-vr user, I think. GE-Proton7-55 lets videoplayers work; otherwise you'd have to disable them.
